parameters.query:
SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(t), '[]'::json) AS result FROM (
  WITH item_stats AS (
    SELECT
      p.id AS pid,
      COALESCE(p.ticker, p.slug) AS sku,
      p.name,
      p.brand,
      p.is_active,
      p.stock_quantity,
      COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE o.status='completed') AS completed,
      COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE o.status LIKE 'cancelled%') AS cancelled,
      COUNT(*) AS total,
      ROUND(AVG(oi.unit_price) FILTER (WHERE o.status LIKE 'cancelled%')/100.0, 2) AS avg_price_eur
    FROM order_items oi
    JOIN orders o ON o.id = oi.order_id
    JOIN products p ON p.id = oi.product_id
    WHERE o.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
      AND o.channel = 'web'
    GROUP BY p.id, p.ticker, p.slug, p.name, p.brand, p.is_active, p.stock_quantity
  )
  SELECT sku, name, brand, is_active, stock_quantity,
         total, cancelled, completed, avg_price_eur,
         ROUND(100.0 * cancelled / NULLIF(total, 0), 1) AS cancel_rate_pct
  FROM item_stats
  WHERE total >= 5
    AND (cancelled::float / NULLIF(total, 0)) >= 0.50
    AND is_active = true
  ORDER BY cancel_rate_pct DESC, total DESC
  LIMIT 20
) t
